title: First Hunt
prompt: Anomalocaris glides into frame from the shadows of a reef shelf, its compound eyes locked on a group of trilobites grazing below. It hovers, almost weightless, then accelerates with a single powerful undulation of its lateral fins. Grasping appendages flare forward in a rapid strike. The trilobites scatter in panicked clouds of sediment. The camera follows the predator's cold pursuit.
